Serving recommendations : Sweet potato shochu is usually blended with hot water in a 6 : 4 or 5 : 5 ratio . Gently pour shochu into a partially filled glass of hot water ... not the other way around . Satoh Distilling Company introduced a new regimen to shochu making in 1991 that emphasized superior ingredients and careful quality control .
